recommendations.title: 15 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema, @ai-rpg-engine/core and 12 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.78 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 90% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 9 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab, @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @mcptoolshop/escape-the-valley show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 12 packages predicted to grow

recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @mcptoolshop/xrpl-lab, @mcptoolshop/escape-the-valley, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 77 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: mcpt, file-compass, a11y-assist, a11y-lint, voice-soundboard scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 1 package in rapid decline
actionableAdvice.action: Check for competing packages, broken releases, or ecosystem changes. Push a patch release or announcement.

actionableAdvice.title: 7 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.78 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 90% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 12 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema, @ai-rpg-engine/core have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
